summary: Iteration 73 - CRM Command Center & Client 360 View testing completed successfully. All features working correctly. Backend: 28/28 tests passed for CRM endpoints. Frontend: CRM Command Center displays 8 clients from backend with correct metrics, Client 360 View shows comprehensive client data with all 6 tabs working.
critical_code_review_comments: CRMCommandCenter.jsx correctly fetches from /api/crm/clients and displays real backend data (8 clients, $22.28M AUM)
Account icons in CRM now render correctly via getAccountIcon() function mapping account types to Lucide icons
Client 360 View displays comprehensive Wheeler family demo data with all sections working
All 6 tabs working: Overview (Goals/Family/Asset Allocation/Insurance/Key Dates), Accounts, Transactions, Tasks, Documents, Timeline
Search and filter functionality working correctly in CRM Command Center
Back to CRM navigation working from Client 360 View
seed_data_creation: None needed - backend has 8 hardcoded demo clients in /app/backend/routes/crm.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 verified all CRM Command Center & Client 360 View features: 1) CRM page at /crm-command-center loads correctly with hero header showing Total AUM ($22.28M), Active Clients (6), Prospects (1), Reviews Due (1), Urgent Tasks (4), 2) Client search filters by name/email, status filter buttons (All/Active/Prospect/Review) working, 3) Client cards display name, status, email, phone, wealth ($), account icons with balances, last contact date, next review, pending tasks/docs badges, 4) Clicking client card navigates to /client-360, 5) Client 360 shows header with client info/wealth, stats bar (Accounts/Tasks/Docs/Satisfaction/NPS/Next Review), 6) All 6 tabs working: Overview (Financial Goals with progress bars, Family members, Asset Allocation, Insurance, Key Dates), Accounts (8 accounts with icons), Transactions, Tasks (with Complete buttons), Documents (with Upload), Timeline (Communication history), 7) Back to CRM button navigates correctly. Note: localStorage.setItem('wealth_command_compliance_v5', 'permanent') bypasses compliance modal.

mocked_apis.Client_360_View: MOCKED - Wheeler family data hardcoded in frontend Client360View.jsx
